Interface IDateFormat2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that format date time.

[Guid("1514C0E1-D8B4-4496-B5FE-EF2085308EDC")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDateFormat2 : IDateFormat

Properties

Calendar 

esriCalendarEnum Calendar { get; set; }

Property Value

esriCalendarEnum

Format 

string Format { get; set; }

Property Value

string

IsHighPrecision

Sets a value indicating if the date is high precision and should display milliseconds when no format string is provided.

bool IsHighPrecision { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

string Locale { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TimeOnly

Indicates if formatted date time contains time only.

bool TimeOnly { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

oadate double
Year int
Month int
Day int

Minute int

millisecond int

TimestampOffsetToString(double, short)

Converts a timestamp with offset to a formatted string.

string TimestampOffsetToString(double TimeStamp, short offsetInMinutes)

Parameters

TimeStamp double
offsetInMinutes short

Returns

string
